steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Rewrite as $6x+7y=2550$ and divide the second by $4$ to get $6x-7y=450$. Add: $$12x=3000 \Rightarrow x=250,$$ then $7y=2550-6(250)=1050$, so $y=150$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $400$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $400$ is the value to enter.
